message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame.crosstab (1 case)

Append 1 live-pandas oracle test covering pd.crosstab():

- crosstab_basic: 6-element row Series ('a'/'b') x 6-element col
  Series ('x'/'y') -> 2x2 contingency-count frame

The test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
pd.crosstab(left, right, dropna=True)), runs the Rust DataFrame::
crosstab(&left, &right), and asserts parity via
compare_dataframe_expected. DataFrameCrosstab was already wired
through the Frame response branch; this fills the live-oracle test
gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-2npiu]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
